scripts.deploy: npm run version:patch && npm run build && git add dist package.json -f && git commit -m "Deploy v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git subtree push --prefix dist origin gh-pages
scripts.pipeline:refresh: npm run fetch:go-pob-data && npm run fetch:skilltree-export && npm run fetch:passive-tree-ru && npm run build:dict && npm run prepare:wasm-data && npm run wasm:build && npm run release:check
scripts.pipeline:refresh:full: npm run pipeline:refresh && npm run fetch:alternate-names && npm run build:dict && npm run release:check
